arxiv_papers.title: Shape and spin axis determination of the Tianwen-2 target asteroid (469219) Kamo'oalewa from lightcurve inversion
arxiv_papers.snippet: Near-Earth asteroid (469219) Kamo'oalewa is an Earth quasi-satellite, temporarily trapped in a 1:1 orbital resonance with our planet. Despite its dynamical relevance and the hypothesis that it may be a lunar ejecta fragment, its physical properties are still poorly constrained. In particular, no rel

arxiv_papers.title: Euclid: Asteroid rotation periods from the Euclid Ecliptic Survey
arxiv_papers.snippet: The Euclid Ecliptic Survey was conducted during the calibration phase of the mission, 23-31 December 2023, as a campaign to study Solar System objects. podcast:
[Antibiotic Apocalypse] Doctor and special correspondent Avir Mitra takes Executive Editor Soren Wheeler, plus a live studio audience, on a journey from the operating room to inside the body to the farm to the sewers and back again—searching for answers to an alarming threat to humanity’s existence as we know it: antibiotic resistance in bacteria. 
 This live show, performed in New York City and also in Little Rock, Arka
